scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.android:apk: npm run cap:sync && cd android && set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr" && set "PATH=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr\bin;%PATH%" && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:apk:release: npm run cap:sync && cd android && set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr" && set "PATH=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr\bin;%PATH%" && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
